data.raceName: GARRARDS HERE ON TRACK PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. MYSTICALFANTASY was out of the money two runs back at this track then was at her best last start to score by a head over 2040m at the same circuit. Meets a comparable field so she can certainly make it two on the bounce. 7. PRECOCIOUS KATE maintained the recent momentum last time out when she scored by 4 metres over 1660m at Albion Park. No harm in drawing here with the sprint lane to rely upon. Tackles a similar assignment and she can go right on with the job. 1. SAN SABA is heading the right way, improving last time out to finish third at Marburg over 1850m. Genuine threat. 6. MAYWYN TROUBADOUR is in the mix at his first run since finishing sixth over 1780m at this track 11 weeks ago.","runners":[4,7,1,6],"exclusive":false}
